name: loom
description: A code intelligence platform that turns repositories, docs, and tickets into one searchable graph. Query code semantically, trace implementation, detect drift, and analyze impact.
author: Devashish

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search code semantically using embeddings and graph expansion

tools.name: get_callers
tools.description: Get all functions that call a specific node

node_id.description: Node ID to find callers for

tools.name: get_spec
tools.description: Get specification/documentation linked to a code node

node_id.description: Node ID to find specs for

tools.name: check_drift
tools.description: Check for AST drift and semantic violations for a code node

node_id.description: Node ID to check drift for

tools.name: get_blast_radius
tools.description: Get nodes affected if a specific node changes (impact analysis)

node_id.description: Node ID to analyze blast radius for

tools.name: get_impact
tools.description: Get code nodes impacted by a ticket/requirement

ticket_id.description: Ticket ID to analyze impact for

tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Get ticket details from Jira integration

tools.name: unimplemented
tools.description: Find tickets that have no implementation links

setup: Install Loom: uv pip install loom
Start FalkorDB: docker run -d -p 6379:6379 --name loom-db falkordb/falkordb
Index your repository: uv run loom analyze . --graph-name myrepo
Configure MCP client with graph name
